name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state



Init == state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
  /\ state[i] = "idle"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
  /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state'[j] = state[j]
  /\ IF \A j \in 1..N : state[j] # "critical" THEN
       state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]

       state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
     ENDIF

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state>>

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

Init ==
  /\ participants = [i \in 1..N |-> [state |-> "Init", vote |-> "None"]]
  /\ coordinator = [state |-> "Init", decision |-> "None"]
  /\ messages = <<>>

Next ==
  \/ /\ coordinator.state = "Init"
     /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "Prepare", from |-> "Coordinator", to |-> "All"])
     /\ coordinator' = [state |-> "WaitingForVotes", decision |-> "None"]
     /\ participants' = participants
  \/ /\ coordinator.state = "WaitingForVotes"
     /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ participants[i].state = "Init"
          /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "VoteYes", from |-> i, to |-> "Coordinator"])
          /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i].state = "VotedYes", ![i].vote = "Yes"]
          /\ coordinator' = coordinator
  \/ /\ coordinator.state = "WaitingForVotes"
     /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ participants[i].state = "Init"
          /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "VoteNo", from |-> i, to |-> "Coordinator"])
          /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i].state = "VotedNo", ![i].vote = "No"]
          /\ coordinator' = coordinator
  \/ /\ coordinator.state = "WaitingForVotes"
     /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ participants[i].state = "VotedYes"
          /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "Commit", from |-> "Coordinator", to |-> i])
          /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i].state = "Committed"]
          /\ coordinator' = [coordinator EXCEPT !.state = "Committed", !.decision = "Commit"]
  \/ /\ coordinator.state = "WaitingForVotes"
     /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ participants[i].state = "VotedNo"
          /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "Abort", from |-> "Coordinator", to |-> i])
          /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i].state = "Aborted"]
          /\ coordinator' = [coordinator EXCEPT !.state = "Aborted", !.decision = "Abort"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
  /\ state \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Helper functions *)
left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Philosopher i picks up forks if hungry and both forks are free *)
CanEat(i) == state[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[i] = FALSE /\ forks[right(i)] = FALSE

(* Next action *)
Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
       /\ forks' = forks
    \/ (* Philosopher i starts eating *)
       /\ CanEat(i)
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE, ![right(i)] = TRUE]
    \/ (* Philosopher i finishes eating *)
       /\ state[i] = "eating"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE, ![right(i)] = FALSE]

(* Initial condition *)
Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

(* num[i] is the ticket number of process i; 0 means no ticket *)
(* flag[i] is TRUE if process i is choosing a number *)

(* TypeOK ensures num[i] is a natural number and flag[i] is a Boolean *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

(* Initial state: all processes have no ticket and are not choosing *)
Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Next-state relation: process i can either choose a number or enter the critical section *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          (flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE] /\ (* i is choosing *)
           /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max([j \in 1..N |-> num[j]])] /\ (* assign ticket *)
           /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]) \* i finished choosing
          \* or i enters critical section
          \/ /\ flag' = flag
              /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0] (* i exits critical section *)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES queue, head, tail, count

vars == <<queue, head, tail, count>>

Init == /\ queue = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

ProducerAction == 
  /\ count < K
  /\ queue' = [queue EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
  /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
  /\ count' = count + 1
  /\ head' = head

ConsumerAction == 
  /\ count > 0
  /\ queue' = [queue EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
  /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
  /\ count' = count - 1
  /\ tail' = tail

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

TypeOK == /\ queue \in [1..K -> 0..1]
          /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ count \in 0..K

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = {}
        /\ state = {}

Next == /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = {}
        /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

TypeOK == 
  /\ readers \in Nat
  /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

Init == 
  /\ readers = 0
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

AcquireRead == 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers' = readers + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

ReleaseRead == 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers > 0
  /\ readers' = readers - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

AcquireWrite == 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers = 0
  /\ writer_active' = TRUE
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

ReleaseWrite == 
  /\ writer_active = TRUE
  /\ writer_active' = FALSE
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

Next == 
  \/ AcquireRead
  \/ ReleaseRead
  \/ AcquireWrite
  \/ ReleaseWrite

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state, channel, marker, snapshot

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ channel = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> <<>>]]
        /\ marker = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> FALSE]]
        /\ snapshot = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> <<>>]]

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N : \E j \in 1..N :
          /\ channel[i][j] # <<>>
          /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![i][j] = Tail(channel[i][j])]
          /\ state' = state
          /\ marker' = marker
          /\ snapshot' = snapshot
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = 0
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = 1]
          /\ channel' = channel
          /\ marker' = [marker EXCEPT ![i] = [j \in 1..N |-> TRUE]]
          /\ snapshot' = snapshot
        \/ \E i \in 1..N : \E j \in 1..N :
          /\ marker[i][j] = TRUE
          /\ marker' = [marker EXCEPT ![i][j] = FALSE]
          /\ channel' = channel
          /\ state' = state
          /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![i][j] = channel[i][j]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, marker, snapshot>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == token \in 1..N

Next == token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store, pendingGets

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
    /\ pendingGets \in [Keys -> [Values -> [Values -> 1]]]

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> 0]  (* 0 represents nil *)
    /\ pendingGets = [k \in Keys |-> [v \in Values |-> 0]]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
        \/ (* Put operation *)
            /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
            /\ pendingGets' = pendingGets
        \/ (* Get operation *)
            /\ pendingGets' = [pendingGets EXCEPT ![k][v] = pendingGets[k][v] + 1]
            /\ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store, pendingGets>>

====

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, ValSet
VARIABLES accepted, ballot, chosen, promised

Init ==
    /\ ballot = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ promised = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ accepted = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> ValSet[1]]]
    /\ chosen = [j \in 1..M |-> ValSet[1]]

Prepare(j, a, b) ==
    /\ a \in 1..N
    /\ b \in 1..N
    /\ b > promised[a]
    /\ promised' = [promised EXCEPT ![a] = b]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ballot, accepted, chosen>>

Accept(j, a, b, v) ==
    /\ a \in 1..N
    /\ b = promised[a]
    /\ accepted' = [accepted EXCEPT ![a] = [ballot |-> b, value |-> v]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ballot, promised, chosen>>

Chosen(j, v) ==
    /\ chosen' = [chosen EXCEPT ![j] = v]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ballot, promised, accepted>>

Next ==
    \/ \E j \in 1..M : \E a \in 1..N : \E b \in 1..N : Prepare(j, a, b)
    \/ \E j \in 1..M : \E a \in 1..N : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in ValSet : Accept(j, a, b, v)
    \/ \E j \in 1..M : \E v \in ValSet : Chosen(j, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<ballot, promised, accepted, chosen>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS File, MAX_RETRIES

VARIABLES senderState, receiverState, retransmitCount

SenderIdle == senderState = "Idle"
SenderTransmitting == senderState = "Transmitting"
SenderDone == senderState = "Done"

ReceiverIdle == receiverState = "Idle"
ReceiverDone == receiverState = "Done"

Init == /\ senderState = "Idle"
        /\ receiverState = "Idle"
        /\ retransmitCount = 0

SendChunk == /\ senderState = "Idle"
            /\ senderState' = "Transmitting"

ReceiveChunk == /\ senderState = "Transmitting"
               /\ receiverState' = "Done"

Retransmit == /\ senderState = "Transmitting"
             /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
             /\ senderState' = "Idle"

Done == /\ senderState = "Transmitting"
       /\ receiverState = "Done"
       /\ senderState' = "Done"

Next == \/ SendChunk
       \/ ReceiveChunk
       \/ Retransmit
       \/ Done

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<senderState, receiverState, retransmitCount>>

TypeOK == /\ senderState \in {"Idle", "Transmitting", "Done"}
         /\ receiverState \in {"Idle", "Done"}
         /\ retransmitCount \in Nat

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolationDB ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES data, txns, activeTxns, nextTxId, r



TypeOK ==
  /\ IsFiniteSet(data)
  /\ IsFiniteSet(txns)
  /\ IsFiniteSet(activeTxns)
  /\ nextTxId \in Nat
  /\ \A t \in txns: t.id \in Nat
  /\ \A t \in txns: t.snapshot \in Seq
  /\ \A t \in txns: t.writes \in Seq

Init ==
  /\ data = <<>>
  /\ txns = <<>>
  /\ activeTxns = <<>>
  /\ nextTxId = 1

Next ==
  \/ (* Begin transaction *)
     /\ \E txId \in Nat: txId = nextTxId
     /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId + 1
     /\ activeTxns' = Append(activeTxns, txId)
     /\ txns' = Append(txns, [id: txId, snapshot: data, writes: <<>>])
  \/ (* Write transaction *)
     /\ \E txId \in activeTxns
     /\ activeTxns' = Tail(activeTxns)
     /\ \E writes \in Seq: writes = Append(Select(txns, id = txId).writes, [record: <<>>])  (* placeholder *)
     /\ txns' = Append(Select(txns, id \ne txId), [id: txId, snapshot: data, writes: writes])
  \/ (* Commit transaction *)
     /\ \E txId \in activeTxns
     /\ activeTxns' = Tail(activeTxns)
     /\ writes = Select(txns, id = txId).writes
     /\ conflict = \E r \in writes: \E r' \in data: r.record = r'.record
     /\ IF conflict THEN
           (* Abort *)
           txns' = Append(Select(txns, id \ne txId), [id: txId, snapshot: data, writes: <<>>])

           (* Commit *)
           data' = Append(data, writes)
     /\ UNCHANGED <<txns, nextTxId>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<data, txns, activeTxns, nextTxId>>

====

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

TypeOK == /\ flag \in [1..2 -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ turn \in 1..2

Init == /\ flag = [x \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 2
        \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Updates

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]
        /\ infected = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![i] = known[i] \cup Updates]
          /\ infected' = [infected EXCEPT ![i] = infected[i] \cup Updates]
        \/ \E i, j \in 1..N :
          /\ i # j
          /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![i] = known[i] \cup known[j]]
          /\ infected' = [infected EXCEPT ![i] = infected[i] \cup infected[j]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Clients

Pages == 1..N

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
       /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Request(c, p) == /\ p \in free
                 /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
                 /\ free' = free \ {p}
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Release(c, p) == /\ p \in allocated[c]
                 /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
                 /\ free' = free \cup {p}
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Next == \E c \in Clients : \E p \in Pages :
          \/ Request(c, p)
          \/ Release(c, p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
         /\ allocated \subseteq [Clients -> SUBSET Pages]
         /\ \A c \in Clients : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
         /\ \A c1, c2 \in Clients : c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] # allocated[c2]

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES subscribers, messages

(* TypeOK ensures all variables have the correct type *)
TypeOK == 
    subscribers \in SUBSET [topic \in Topics |-> Subscribers] /\
    messages \in SUBSET [topic \in Topics |-> Messages]

(* Init sets up an empty broker *)
Init == 
    subscribers = [topic \in Topics |-> {}] /\
    messages = [topic \in Topics |-> {}]

(* Next models a message arriving on a topic *)
Next == 
    \E topic \in Topics : \E msg \in Messages :
        /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![topic] = Append(messages[topic], msg)]
        /\ subscribers' = subscribers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages>>

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> FALSE]

Next == 
  \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
      /\ wants[1] = FALSE
      /\ turn' = turn
      /\ wants' = wants
  \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
      /\ wants[1] = TRUE
      /\ turn' = 1
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
  \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
      /\ wants[1] = FALSE
      /\ turn' = 0
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = FALSE]
  \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
      /\ wants[1] = TRUE
      /\ turn' = turn
      /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, NodeSet

VARIABLES counts

TypeOK == /\ counts \in [NodeSet -> [NodeSet -> Nat]]
          /\ \A n \in NodeSet: counts[n] \in [NodeSet -> Nat]

Init == /\ counts = [n \in NodeSet |-> [m \in NodeSet |-> 0]]

Next == /\ \E n \in NodeSet:
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [counts[n] EXCEPT ![n] = counts[n][n] + 1]]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>  (* all other variables unchanged *)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
